steps.t: The mysterious footprints of which the Rangers spoke can be found north-west of Echad Taerdim. You should find the footprints with Legolas.
You have discovered evidence of an Ungoledain presence in Cirith Ungol. You should follow the tracks to find the Ungoledain.
Legolas would like to regroup in a safer location. You should find a safer spot to talk south of Cadar Skûs.
You are being ambushed! Defeat the attacker!
